focusAreas.title: Vulnerability Research
focusAreas.description: Deep-dive vulnerability analysis, root cause analysis, exploit development, and responsible disclosure coordination with vendors and CERTs.

focusAreas.title: Threat Intelligence
focusAreas.description: Curated advisories, emerging threat tracking, breach notification monitoring, IOC collection, and defensive intelligence for blue teams.

focusAreas.title: Responsible Disclosure
focusAreas.description: Structured vulnerability disclosure program, coordinated vendor communication, and public advisory publication with mitigation guidance.

focusAreas.title: Digital Forensics & DFIR
focusAreas.description: Incident response tooling, forensic artifact parsers, timeline analysis, memory forensics, and evidence preservation workflows.

focusAreas.title: Malware Analysis
focusAreas.description: Static and dynamic malware analysis, family classification, YARA rule development, unpacking, and behavioral profiling.

focusAreas.title: AI for Cyber Security
focusAreas.description: LLM-assisted vulnerability discovery, automated triage, intelligent log analysis, and AI-powered threat hunting workflows.

focusAreas.title: Open Source Security Tools
focusAreas.description: Production-grade security tools released under permissive licenses — scanners, parsers, analyzers, and automation frameworks.

focusAreas.title: Security Education & Community
focusAreas.description: Technical blogs, research paper summaries, interactive labs, mentorship programs, and open knowledge sharing.
